Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 4, 136 [Namburbu][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[NAM].⸢BUR₂⸣.BI ḪUL MUŠ ša₂ ina ⸢E₂⸣ NA AN [...]

(o 1) Namburbû-ritual against the evil of a snake which ... [...] in a man's house.

o 22

⸢ḪUL⸣-šu₂ ana NA u E₂-šu₂ la₃ [...]

(o 2) So that its evil does not [...] on the man and his house.

o 33

DU₃.DU₃-BI ina GU₂ ID₂ KI SAR A KU₃.GA ŠUB.⸢ŠUB⸣[di ...]

(o 3) Its ritual: at the river bank, you sweep the ground; you keep pouring pure water; you set up [...]; you set out 12 emmer-wheat loaves; [...] suluppu-dates (and) powder of [...];

o 44

GUBan 12 NINDA IMGAGA KEŠ₂ ZU₂.LUM.MA KU.[KU ...]

o 55

3 dugLA.ḪA.AN-MEŠ KAŠ SAG SA₅-ma GUBan I₃ x [...]

(o 5) you fill 3 lahannu-flasks (with) first-class beer and you set (them) up correctly; [...] oil of ... [...]; you set up [...]; you set in place a censer of burāšu-juniper; you present the offering; ... [...];

o 66

GUBan NIG₂.NA šimLI GARan uduSISKUR₂ BALqi₂ x [...]

o 77

⸢šid⸣-du GID₂ad ZI₃.DUB.DUB.BU ŠUB.ŠUBdi E₃ [...]

(o 7) you hang a curtain; you keep throwing small heaps of flour; ... [...].

o 88

UGU MUŠ LU₂ BI UGU GUBaz-ma ŠIDtu₂ an-ni-⸢tu₂⸣ ŠIDnu

(o 8) That man stands over the snake and you recite this incantation:

o 99

[...] ⸢muš⸣-te-še-er ANe u KIti₃ dUTU da-a-[a-nu ...]

(o 9) [...] the one who puts in order heaven and earth; Šamaš, judge [...];

o 1010

⸢SIPA⸣ ki-i-ni ša₂ ka-la te-ne₂-še-⸢e⸣-[ti ...]

(o 10) Faithful shepherd of all the people [...];

o 1111

[d]UTU da-a-a-na-ta IGI-ka ak-[mis ...]

(o 11) Šamaš, you are the judge: I kneel in front of you [...].

o 1212

[...] ⸢MUŠ⸣ an-ne₂-e ša₂ dNIN.KILIM ina E₂ [...]

(o 12) [...] of this snake which the mongoose [...] in the house.

o 1313

[pal]-⸢ḫa⸣-ku ad-ra-ku u šu-ta-du-ra-[ku ...]

(o 13) I am frightened, I am afraid and I am absolutely terrified [...].

o 1414

[ḪUL]-šu₂ a-a ⸢TE⸣ [a]-a iq-ri-ba a-a DIM₄ a-a [...]

(o 14) May its evil not approach me! May it not come closer to me! May it not creep up on me! May it not [...]

o 1515

[...] ⸢lib⸣-bal-kit [...]

(o 15) [...] may it cross over [...]

o 1616

[...] ina [...]

(o 16) [...] in [...]

o 1717

[...] ⸢li⸣-[tel]-⸢li⸣ [...]

(o 17) [...] may it keep going up [...]

(rest of obverse missing)
